name: HP Pavilion 15

description: Dell Inspiron 14 offers premium productivity with an Intel i7 13th Gen processor, 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD, and lightweight aluminum design.

name: Apple MacBook Air M2
description: Apple MacBook Air M2 chip, 8GB unified memory, 256GB SSD, 13.6-inch Liquid Retina Display. Elegant performance with silent cooling.

description: Lenovo IdeaPad Gaming 3 powered by AMD Ryzen 5, 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD, and NVIDIA RTX 3050 — for serious gaming performance.

name: ASUS TUF Gaming F15
description: ASUS TUF Gaming F15, Intel Core i7, RTX 3050Ti, 144Hz display, and military-grade durability for intense gaming sessions.

name: Acer Aspire 5
description: Acer Aspire 5 features Intel Core i5, 8GB RAM, 512GB SSD, and sleek aluminum design — perfect balance of productivity and style.

name: Samsung 24-inch Curved Monitor
description: Samsung 24-inch curved FHD monitor with ultra-slim design, immersive visuals, and Eye Saver mode for long working hours.

name: Logitech MX Master 3S Mouse
description: Logitech MX Master 3S ergonomic wireless mouse with 8000 DPI sensor, quiet clicks, and multi-device connectivity.

name: Razer BlackWidow V4 Keyboard
description: Razer BlackWidow V4 mechanical keyboard with RGB lighting, programmable keys, and durable switches for gaming.

name: Canon PIXMA G2020 Printer
